task_completion.description: Format role titles as centered H1 headings on new pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the role titles (e.g., 'Incident Commander', 'Medical Care Branch Director') to be centered, styled with a large Heading 1 font, and appearing at the top of a new page (indicating page breaks were used).
Look for a 2-column table structure containing the position details (such as 'Reports To', 'Mission', etc.) located below the role titles.
Look for the time-phase headers (e.g., 'Immediate Actions (0-2 Hours)') styled as Heading 2 (typically bold and slightly smaller than the H1 role titles).

task_completion.description: Format action items as numbered lists.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for sequential numbering (1., 2., 3., etc.) applied to the list of action items under each time-phase.

task_completion.description: Format safety notes with bold text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text representing safety notes to be styled with a bold font weight.
Look for the word processor's title bar displaying 'hics_jas_formatted.odt' or a file manager window showing the newly created file in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing LibreOffice Writer or a similar GUI application being used to edit the .odt file, rather than terminal commands or python scripts doing the formatting.

integrity.description: The agent did not change or delete the core content of the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the text within the document to ensure the original instructions, action items, and role descriptions are still present and not replaced by placeholder text.

integrity.description: The agent applied actual formatting styles rather than just typing out formatting markers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of the styling toolbar (e.g., selecting 'Heading 1', 'Heading 2', the table insertion tool, and the numbered list button) rather than manually typing numbers or markdown symbols.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The raw document contains exactly 4 roles ('Incident Commander', 'Medical Care Branch Director', 'Security Branch Director', 'Public Information Officer') which must be formatted as centered H1 on new pages. It contains exactly 3 time-phases ('Immediate Actions (0-2 Hours)', 'Intermediate Actions (2-12 Hours)', 'Extended Actions (12+ Hours)') which must be formatted as H2. The expected output file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/hics_jas_formatted.odt.
